form.formComment: Talented type with an excellent strike rate at this journey. Has been prominent in the run and duly saluted at his last couple, most recently over 400m at The Gardens in a handy 22.49 beating Deadly Venom. On a hot winning streak and likely to score again.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Lines up from box 2 for the first time after finishing a 10 length fourth at The Gardens (23.19) in a Grade 5. Looks a leading chance.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Temora (19.46) in a Grade 5, finishing a 6 length fourth. Has performed well off the draw with a win and two places from four starts. Suited here and expected to run well.

form.formComment: Fast starter. Latest effort finished 7th over 388m at this track beaten 12 lengths (23.52) behind Tiny Sniffy in a Grade 5 on March 31. Happy to overlook recent efforts. Well placed and gets chance to find best.
